headline: Houlihan Lokey, State Street, Stifel, Blackstone, and TPG Shares Plummet, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after the release of a surprisingly weak February jobs report showed an unexpected drop in employment.

headline: Blackstone, Ares Back $5 Billion Financing for Thoma Bravo's WWEX-Auctane Merger
summary: Private credit lenders fund Thoma Bravo's logistics-software tie-up, valuing the combined WWEX and Auctane business at about $11.6 billion.

headline: Blackstone (BX) Coverage Reinstated by Barclays with $126 Price Target
summary: Blackstone Inc. (NYSE:BX) is included among the 15 Best Stocks to Buy Now for Passive Income. On March 5, Barclays analyst Benjamin Budish reinstated coverage of Blackstone Inc.
